economic_notes: First Nation owns 100% of Mississaugi Retail Cannabis Corporation (GBE, equity method). Robinson Huron Treaty settlement of $10 billion approved November 1, 2023 by federal and provincial governments; First Nation guaranteed $745,500 (4.45% of total loan).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations — management did not complete assessment of tangible capital assets for potential AROs. Mississaugi Retail Cannabis Corporation is accounted for on modified equity basis as a GBE (1 GBE). Restricted cash of $353,916 held for CMHC reserves. Due from Mississagi Trust (restricted) of $1,895,441 included in financial assets. Trust Funds held by Federal Government of $159,526 also in financial assets. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $9,629,487 + Gov't of Canada Other $1,964,522 + Province of Ontario $2,154,834 + North Shore Tribal Council $1,421,605 = $15,170,448. OSR includes band enterprises, OFNLP, other revenue, trust funds, investment income, and gains. Housing expenses included within 'Other' segment ($4,136,643 other expenses). Remuneration schedule referenced but not included in extracted text.
